item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
pattern='generated_at|timestamp|created_at|updated_at|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}([Tt ][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2}(\\.[0-9]+)?)?([Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2})?)?|\\b[0-9]{10}([0-9]{3})?\\b'
scan_output="'$(rg -n -i -e "$pattern" longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md 2>&1)
scan_exit=$?
if [ -n "$scan_output" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$scan_output"; else printf '"'%s\\n' '(no matches)'; fi
printf 'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$scan_exit"'

/bin/zsh -lc "set +e
pattern='generated_at|timestamp|created_at|updated_at|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}([Tt ][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2}(\\.[0-9]+)?)?([Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2})?)?|\\b[0-9]{10}([0-9]{3})?\\b'
scan_output="'$(rg -n -i -e "$pattern" longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md 2>&1)
scan_exit=$?
if [ -n "$scan_output" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$scan_output"; else printf '"'%s\\n' '(no matches)'; fi
printf 'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$scan_exit"'
